error.signature: org.apache.kafka.common.errors.SerializationException: Error deserializing key/value for partition my_topic-0. If needed, please seek past the record to continue consumption.
error.regex: (SerializationException|Error deserializing|deserialization error|DeserializationException|cannot deserialize.*message|seek past the record)

verdict.summary: Consumer cannot deserialize message. Schema mismatch, wrong deserializer configured, or producer sent corrupted/different format data.

dead_ends.action: Skip the bad message by seeking past it without logging
dead_ends.why_fails: Silently losing messages leads to data gaps. Always log or dead-letter failed messages for later analysis.

dead_ends.action: Change the consumer deserializer to StringDeserializer as a quick fix
dead_ends.why_fails: Masking the format mismatch pushes the parsing failure downstream. Fix the root cause (schema mismatch) instead.

workarounds.action: Implement an ErrorHandlingDeserializer to catch and route bad messages
workarounds.how: Spring: ErrorHandlingDeserializer wraps your deserializer and sends failures to error handler. Confluent: use DeadLetterQueueReporter.

workarounds.action: Verify producer and consumer use matching serializer/deserializer
workarounds.how: Producer: value.serializer=AvroSerializer; Consumer: value.deserializer=AvroDeserializer  # must match

workarounds.action: Use Schema Registry to enforce schema compatibility
